form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after seven months in a small field at Laurel on February 28 over 1106m, 11 len behind Cairo Surprise with 55kg at $10.60. Previously second-up didn't finish the race at Delaware Park in the LR August 14 over 1207m. Expecting improvement and is among the better chances.

form.formComment: Claiming his maiden victory on debut; favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.75 len at this track March 26 over 905m defeating Warrior's Notion with 55.5kg at $2.40. Unlikely to be contesting the finish despite that strong debut.

form.formComment: Returns from a 43-day let-up. Most recently 5th of 7 at Tampa Bay Downs on February 27 over 1207m, 11 len behind Fulmine with 53.5kg at $22.70. The run before that second last in a small field at Tampa Bay Downs on January 24 over 1207m, 16 len behind Ball Of Fire with 53.5kg at $2.40. Nicely placed to make amends.
